directive: Fix two regressions in Omegon: (1) OpenAI/Codex auth persistence is not surviving across process restarts, and (2) Anthropic conversation repair still produces invalid tool_use/tool_result sequencing instead of a valid repaired history. Add or update tests, validate with typecheck/tests, and prepare a commit.

children.label: auth
children.description: Investigate and fix OpenAI/Codex auth persistence across process restarts, update/add tests, and validate the auth persistence behavior.

children.label: repair
children.description: Investigate and fix Anthropic conversation repair so tool_use blocks are followed by matching tool_result blocks in repaired history, add regression tests, and validate repaired sequencing.

plan.rationale: The auth persistence bug and conversation-repair bug are separate regressions with different likely code paths, so they can be investigated independently before validation.
